[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000111 3
1 1000000 1
2 0000111 3
3 0100000 1
4 1011000 3
5 0111001 4
6 1010000 2
7 0000000 a

01 10 0001000 1
12 21 0011010 3
23 32 0000010 1
34 43 0000000 a match 7
45 54 0000000 a match 7
56 65 0011001 3
67 76 0110000 2
70 07 1000000 1 match 1

02 20 1001000 2
13 31 0000111 3 match 0 2
24 42 1000000 1 match 1
35 53 0000111 3 match 0 2
46 64 0100000 1 match 3
57 75 0010000 1
60 06 0001000 1
71 17 0110000 2

03 30 0000000 a match 7
14 41 0100000 1 match 3
25 52 0011010 3
36 63 0000001 1
47 74 1100000 2
50 05 0001000 1
61 16 0111001 4 match 5
72 27 1010000 2 match 6

04 40 1000000 1 match 1
15 51 0011111 5
26 62 0011000 2
37 73 0000000 a match 7
